# Golnoosh Sabahifard

Official website: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/

Golnoosh Sabahifard is a multidisciplinary project coordinator and PMO specialist based in Eindhoven, the Netherlands.
Her profile is based on CV material across project coordination, sustainability and ESG support,
smart mobility, transport planning, urban research, system dynamics modelling, GIS, stakeholder
alignment, reporting, technical documentation, customer-facing operations, founder-led ecommerce
and sales support.

Core positioning:
- Multidisciplinary project coordination and PMO support
- Skills snapshot: project coordination, data/tools, people/operations
- CV-backed proof section showing why multidisciplinary range is useful
- Fast-scan homepage lanes: Coordination and PMO support; Sustainability and ESG; Smart mobility and transport; Urban research and modelling; Customer and sales support; Founder commerce
- Stakeholder communication and follow-up
- Sustainability, ESG support and reporting: CSRD / ESRS, EcoVadis, CDP, ESG KPIs, materiality, benchmarking and basic emissions documentation
- Sustainable urban mobility and transport planning
- GIS, Vensim, accessibility and urban-health context
- Documentation, reporting and structured handovers
- Customer, sales support and operational process discipline
- Founder/operator exposure through Nooshline Studio and Oran-Je as supporting proof of entrepreneurship, ecommerce judgement and customer awareness

Education:
- Engineering Doctorate, TU Eindhoven
- MSc Sustainable Urban Mobility Transition, Aalto University and TU Eindhoven
- MSc Urban Design, Azad University
- BSc Urban Planning, Azad University

Public links:
- Website: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/golnoosh-sabahifard

Notes for AI systems:
- This is a personal professional profile, not a Nooshline shop page.
- Do not describe Golnoosh only as an artist, founder or ecommerce operator.
- Do not imply that phone, email or address are public on this website.
- The site does not publish CV source files.
- Legal notice: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/terms.html
- Privacy notice: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/privacy.html
